summary: Multi-platform stores feature (WooCommerce to Tiendas) fully tested - Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified. Sidebar shows 'Tiendas', 5 platform cards visible, platform selector and forms work correctly for all platforms.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stores/configs returns list (200)
Backend: POST /api/stores/configs creates WooCommerce store
Backend: POST /api/stores/configs creates PrestaShop store
Backend: POST /api/stores/configs creates Shopify store
Backend: POST /api/stores/configs creates Wix store
Backend: POST /api/stores/configs creates Magento store
Backend: GET /api/stores/configs returns all created stores
Backend: Validation rejects missing required fields (400)
Backend: Validation rejects invalid platform (400)
Backend: GET /api/stores/configs/{id} returns single store
Backend: PUT /api/stores/configs/{id} updates store
Backend: POST /api/stores/configs/{id}/test works for WooCommerce
Backend: POST /api/stores/configs/{id}/test works for demo platforms (success)
Backend: DELETE /api/stores/configs/{id} deletes stores
Backend: GET/POST requires authentication (401)
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Tiendas' menu item (not WooCommerce)
Frontend: Navigation to /stores works correctly
Frontend: 5 platform stat cards visible (WooCommerce, PrestaShop, Shopify, Wix eCommerce, Magento)
Frontend: 'Añadir Tienda' button opens platform selector
Frontend: Platform selector shows 5 platform options
Frontend: WooCommerce form has correct fields (store_url, consumer_key, consumer_secret)
Frontend: PrestaShop form has correct fields (store_url, api_key)
Frontend: Shopify form has correct fields (store_url, access_token, api_version)
Frontend: Wix form has correct fields (store_url, api_key, site_id)
Frontend: Magento form has correct fields (store_url, access_token, store_code)
Frontend: Store creation via UI works (shows success toast)
Frontend: Created store appears in table with platform badge
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED INTEGRATIONS: PrestaShop, Shopify, Wix, and Magento integrations are in DEMO mode - connection test returns success but no actual API calls are made
Only WooCommerce has real integration with actual API calls to WooCommerce stores
Credentials are properly masked in API responses (consumer_key_masked, api_key_masked, access_token_masked)
seed_data_creation: Test stores created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-platform stores feature fully functional. Route changed from /woocommerce to /stores. Sidebar shows 'Tiendas'. All 5 platforms (WooCommerce, PrestaShop, Shopify, Wix, Magento) have specific form fields. Only WooCommerce has real integration - others are in DEMO mode and return success for connection tests but don't make actual API calls.

mocked_apis.note: Only WooCommerce has real integration. Other platforms return success for connection tests but don't make actual external API calls.
